entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Inspir ରେ ଆମ ମିଶନ୍ ହେଉଛି ଶିକ୍ଷାକୁ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ସୁଲଭ, ଆକର୍ଷକ ଓ ଆନନ୍ଦମୟ କରି ଲୋକତାନ୍ତ୍ରିକ କରିବା। ପୃଷ୍ଠଭୂମି କିମ୍ବା ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଯାହାହେଉ, ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକଙ୍କର ଗୁଣତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଶିକ୍ଷାର ଅଧିକାର ଅଛି ବୋଲି ଆମେ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରୁ। ଆମ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ସଫଳତା ପାଇଁ ଦରକାରୀ ଉପକରଣ ଓ ସମ୍ପଦ ଦେବା ସହିତ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରତି ଭଲପାଇବା ଗଢ଼ିବା ପାଇଁ ଡିଜାଇନ୍ ହୋଇଛି। ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ପରସ୍ପର ଏବଂ ସମଗ୍ର ବିଶ୍ୱର ଶିକ୍ଷକମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଯୋଡ଼ିହୋଇପାରିବା ଏମିତି ଏକ ସମାବେଶୀ, ସହାୟକ ଓ ସଶକ୍ତିକରଣକାରୀ ସମୁଦାୟ ତିଆରି କରିବାକୁ ଆମେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରୁ। ଶିକ୍ଷାକୁ ମଜାଦାର ଓ ସୁଲଭ କରି, ଭବିଷ୍ୟତର ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜ୍ ସମାଧାନ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ ଜୀବନବ୍ୟାପୀ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀଙ୍କ ଏକ ପିଢ଼ିକୁ ପ୍ରେରିତ କରିବା ଆମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ।

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA ହେଉଛି ଦେଶର ପ୍ରଥମ state law ଯାହା commercial websites ଓ online services କୁ privacy policy post କରିବାକୁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କରେ। ଏହି law ର ପ୍ରଭାବ California ଠାରୁ ବହୁତ ଦୂରକୁ ପହଞ୍ଚେ; United States ରେ, ଏବଂ ସମ୍ଭବତଃ ବିଶ୍ୱରେ, California consumers ଠାରୁ personally identifiable information ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରୁଥିବା websites ଚଳାଉଥିବା person କିମ୍ବା company କୁ ନିଜ website ଉପରେ conspicuous privacy policy post କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼େ, ଯାହାରେ କେଉଁ ସୂଚନା ସଂଗ୍ରହ ହେଉଛି ଓ କାହା ସହ share ହେଉଛି ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଥାଏ, ଏବଂ ସେହି policy ପାଳନ କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼େ।

entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: 13 ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ଶିଶୁମାନଙ୍କୁ ଆପ୍ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାକୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କରାଯାଏ, କିନ୍ତୁ ବୟସ୍କଙ୍କ ନିରୀକ୍ଷଣରେ। ତଥାପି, ଆମେ ଜାଣିଶୁଣି 13 ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ଶିଶୁଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ କୌଣସି ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସୂଚନା ସଂଗ୍ରହ କିମ୍ବା ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା କରୁନାହୁଁ, ଏବଂ ଅଭିଭାବକୀୟ ସମ୍ମତି ବିନା 13 ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ବ୍ୟବହାରକାରୀଙ୍କୁ ଆମକୁ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସୂଚନା ଦେବାରୁ ଏଠାରେ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟଭାବେ ନିଷେଧ କରୁଛୁ। ଆପଣ 13 ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ଶିଶୁଙ୍କ ଅଭିଭାବକ ହେଲେ ଏବଂ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଶିଶୁ ଆମକୁ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି ବୋଲି ଭାବୁଥିଲେ, ଆମେ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ନେବୁ ଏବଂ ଦରକାର ହେଲେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ସୂଚିତ କରିବୁ। ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରିତ ସମୟସୀମା ନାହିଁ; ଏହା ଆମେ ସମ୍ଭାଳୁଥିବା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନର ପରିମାଣ ଓ ଉପଲବ୍ଧ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟଶକ୍ତି ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭର କରେ।

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଥମଥର ପାଇଁ, ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଜାତୀୟ ଇତିହାସ ନଥିବା ଏକ ପୂର୍ବତନ ଉପନିବେଶ ବିଶ୍ୱଶକ୍ତି ହେଲା। Europe ର kings ଓ queens ଙ୍କୁ ହଟାଯାଇଲା, ଏବଂ United States of America democracy, capitalism ଓ free world ର ପ୍ରତୀକ ଭାବେ ଉଦୟ ହେଲା। ସେହି ସମୟରେ communism ର ନୂଆ ideology ଉଦୟ ହେଲା ଏବଂ Soviet Union ତାହାର ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ରୂପ ହେଲା।

entries.source: Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) may, at its sole discretion, offer a Subscription with a free trial for a limited period of time ("Free Trial"). On the last day of Free Trial period, unless you cancelled your Subscription, you will be automatically charged the applicable Subscription fees for the type of Subscription you have selected. At any time and without notice, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to (i) modify Terms of Service of Free Trial offer, or (ii) cancel such Free Trial offer.

entries.value: ଆପଣ European Union (EU) ଓ European Economic Area (EEA) ର resident ହେଲେ, GDPR ଅଧୀନରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ କିଛି data protection rights ଅଛି। ଆପଣଙ୍କ Personal Data correct, amend, delete କିମ୍ବା use limit କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରିବାକୁ ଆମେ ଯୁକ୍ତିସଂଗତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ନେବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରୁ। ଆମେ ଆପଣ ବିଷୟରେ କେଉଁ Personal Data ରଖିଛୁ ଜାଣିବାକୁ କିମ୍ବା ସେହି data ଆମ systems ରୁ remove କରାଇବାକୁ ଚାହିଁଲେ support@inspir.app କୁ email କରନ୍ତୁ। EU/EEA resident ଭାବେ GDPR ଅଧୀନରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ data protection rights ରହିଛି; କିଛି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ତଳୋକ୍ତ ଅଧିକାର ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ମିଳେ।

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: Service (“Purchase”) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଉପଲବ୍ଧ କୌଣସି product କିମ୍ବା service କିଣିବାକୁ ଚାହିଁଲେ, ଆପଣଙ୍କ Purchase ସହ ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ କିଛି ସୂଚନା ଦେବାକୁ ପଚାରାଯାଇପାରେ, ଯାହାରେ credit/debit card number, card expiration date, billing address ଓ shipping information ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ ହୋଇପାରେ। ଆପଣ ଘୋଷଣା ଓ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରୁଛନ୍ତି ଯେ: (i) କୌଣସି Purchase ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧରେ card(s) କିମ୍ବା payment method(s) ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର legal right ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାଖରେ ଅଛି; ଏବଂ (ii) ଆପଣ ଦେଉଥିବା ସୂଚନା ସତ୍ୟ, ସଠିକ୍ ଓ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ। Payment ଓ Purchases ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କରିବାକୁ ଆମେ third-party services ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିପାରୁ। ଆପଣ ସୂଚନା submit କରିବା ଦ୍ୱାରା, Privacy Policy ଅନୁସାରେ ସେହି ସୂଚନା third parties କୁ ଦେବାର ଅଧିକାର ଆମକୁ ଦେଉଛନ୍ତି। Product/service availability, description କିମ୍ବା price ର error, order ର error କିମ୍ବା ଅନ୍ୟ କାରଣ ସମେତ, ଯେକେବେଳେ ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ order refuse ବା cancel କରିବାର ଅଧିକାର ରଖୁଛୁ। Fraud କିମ୍ବା unauthorized/illegal transaction ସନ୍ଦେହ ହେଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ order refuse ବା cancel କରିପାରୁ; ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ଆମର ହେବ ଏବଂ ତାହାକୁ ଆପତ୍ତି କରାଯାଇପାରିବ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: ରେ a world କେଉଁଠି AI ହେଉଛି rapidly advancing, ଏହା ହେବ only ହେବା human consciousness ଓ ସୃଜନଶୀଳତା ସେହି ପାରେ survive. Albert Einstein once said, "ସୃଜନଶୀଳତା ହେଉଛି intelligence having fun."

If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices concerning your personal information, please contact us at support@inspir.app. When you visit our website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, use our mobile applications, as the case may be (the "App") and more generally, use any of our services (the "Services", which include the Website and App), we appreciate that you are trusting us with your personal information. We take your privacy very seriously. In this privacy notice, we seek to explain to you in the clearest way possible what information we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to it. We hope you take some time to read through it carefully, as it is important. If there are any terms in this privacy notice that you disagree with, please discontinue the use of our Services immediately. This privacy notice applies to all information collected through our Services (which, as described above, includes our Website and App), as well as, any related services, sales, marketing or events. Please read this privacy notice carefully as it will help you understand what we do with the information that we collect. Our Terms and Conditions govern all use of our Service and together with the Privacy Policy constitute your agreement with us (“Agreement”).

entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information ହଟାଇବା ପାଇଁ: ଆପଣ ଏହି ଅନୁରୋଧ କଲେ, ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଅନୁରୋଧର ତାରିଖ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଆମ record ରେ ଥିବା ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information କୁ ହଟାଇବୁ ଏବଂ service providers ମାନଙ୍କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ସେହି କାମ କରିବାକୁ କହିବୁ। କେତେକ ମାମଲାରେ ସୂଚନାକୁ de-identify କରି deletion କରାଯାଇପାରେ। ଆପଣ personal information ହଟାଇବାକୁ ବାଛିଲେ, ସେହି ସୂଚନା ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ଥିବା କିଛି function ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ। ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information ବିକ୍ରି ବନ୍ଦ କରିବା ପାଇଁ: ଆମେ କୌଣସି ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information third parties କୁ ବିକ୍ରି କିମ୍ବା rent କରୁନାହୁଁ। ଆମେ monetary consideration ପାଇଁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information ବିକ୍ରି କରୁନାହୁଁ। ତଥାପି କେତେକ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ, ଟଙ୍କା ବିନା third party କିମ୍ବା ଆମ company family ଭିତରେ personal information ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର California law ଅନୁସାରେ “sale” ଭାବେ ଧରାଯାଇପାରେ। ଆପଣ ଆପଣଙ୍କ Personal Data ର ଏକମାତ୍ର owner ଏବଂ କେବେବେଳେ ମଧ୍ୟ disclosure କିମ୍ବା deletion ଅନୁରୋଧ କରିପାରିବେ। ଆପଣ personal information ବିକ୍ରି ବନ୍ଦ କରିବା ଅନୁରୋଧ କଲେ, ଆମେ ସେହି ପ୍ରକାର transfer ବନ୍ଦ କରିବୁ। ଦୟାକରି ଧ୍ୟାନ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ, data delete କିମ୍ବା selling stop କରିବାକୁ କହିଲେ ଆମ ସହିତ ଆପଣଙ୍କ experience ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହୋଇପାରେ, ଏବଂ personal information ଦରକାର ଥିବା କିଛି program କିମ୍ବା membership service ରେ ଭାଗ ନେଇପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଆପଣ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଅଧିକାର ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିଲେ ଆମେ କୌଣସି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଭେଦଭାବ କରିବୁ ନାହିଁ। ଉପରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣିତ California data protection rights ବ୍ୟବହାର ପାଇଁ support@inspir.app କୁ email ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଅନୁରୋଧ ପଠାନ୍ତୁ। ଏହି ଅଧିକାରଗୁଡିକ CCPA, ଅର୍ଥାତ୍ California Consumer Privacy Act ଅଧୀନରେ ଆସେ। ଅଧିକ ଜାଣିବାକୁ official California Legislative Information website ଦେଖନ୍ତୁ। CCPA 01/01/2020 ଠାରୁ ପ୍ରଭାବୀ ହୋଇଥିଲା।

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: ଆମେ Do Not Track signals କୁ ସମ୍ମାନ କରୁ ଏବଂ Do Not Track browser mechanism ଚାଲୁ ଥିଲେ track କରୁନାହୁଁ, cookies plant କରୁନାହୁଁ କିମ୍ବା advertising ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁନାହୁଁ। Do Not Track ହେଉଛି ଆପଣଙ୍କ web browser ରେ ଥିବା preference, ଯାହା websites କୁ ଆପଣ track ହେବାକୁ ଚାହୁଁନାହାନ୍ତି ବୋଲି ଜଣାଏ। Browser ର Preferences କିମ୍ବା Settings page କୁ ଯାଇ Do Not Track enable କିମ୍ବା disable କରିପାରିବେ। ଆପଣ 18 ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍, California ରେ ବସୁଛନ୍ତି, ଏବଂ Service ରେ registered account ଅଛି ହେଲେ, Services ଉପରେ ଆପଣ publicly post କରିଥିବା unwanted data remove କରିବାକୁ request କରିବାର ଅଧିକାର ଅଛି। ସେହି data remove ପାଇଁ, ନିମ୍ନୋକ୍ତ contact information ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି ଆମ ସହ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ account ସହ ଜଡିତ email address ଓ ଆପଣ California ରେ ବସୁଛନ୍ତି ବୋଲି statement ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ। Data Services ଉପରେ publicly displayed ନହୋଇଥାଏ ବୋଲି ଆମେ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିବୁ, କିନ୍ତୁ backups ଇତ୍ୟାଦି ସମେତ ଆମ ସମସ୍ତ systems ରୁ data ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବେ remove ହୋଇନପାରେ।

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: ଆମେ Service ଭିତରେ paid products ଏବଂ/କିମ୍ବା services ଦେଇପାରୁ। ସେହି ମାମଲାରେ payment processing ପାଇଁ ଆମେ third-party services (ଯଥା payment processors) ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁ। ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ payment card details store କିମ୍ବା collect କରିବୁ ନାହିଁ। ସେହି ସୂଚନା ସିଧାସଳଖ ଆମ third-party payment processors କୁ ଦିଆଯାଏ, ଯେଉଁମାନଙ୍କ Privacy Policy ଆପଣଙ୍କ personal information ବ୍ୟବହାରକୁ ଶାସନ କରେ। ଏହି payment processors PCI Security Standards Council ଦ୍ୱାରା managed PCI-DSS standards ପାଳନ କରନ୍ତି, ଯାହା Visa, Mastercard, American Express ଓ Discover ପରି brands ର ସଂଯୁକ୍ତ ପ୍ରୟାସ। PCI-DSS requirements payment information ର secure handling ସୁନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: ଆମେ ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କ intellectual property rights କୁ ସମ୍ମାନ କରୁ। Service ଉପରେ post ହୋଇଥିବା Content କୌଣସି person କିମ୍ବା entity ର copyright କିମ୍ବା ଅନ୍ୟ intellectual property rights ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ (“Infringement”) କରୁଛି ବୋଲି କୌଣସି claim ଆସିଲେ ତାହାକୁ respond କରିବା ଆମ policy। ଆପଣ copyright owner କିମ୍ବା owner ପକ୍ଷରୁ authorized ହେଲେ, ଏବଂ copyrighted work ଏପରି ଭାବେ copy ହୋଇଛି ଯାହା copyright infringement ଗଠନ କରେ ବୋଲି ଭାବୁଥିଲେ, “Copyright Infringement” subject line ସହ support@inspir.app କୁ email ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ claim submit କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” ଅଧୀନରେ ନିମ୍ନେ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିବା alleged Infringement ର ବିସ୍ତୃତ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା ଯୋଡ଼ନ୍ତୁ। Service ଉପରେ କିମ୍ବା Service ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ମିଳୁଥିବା Content ଉପରେ infringement ବିଷୟରେ misrepresentation କିମ୍ବା bad-faith claim ପାଇଁ ଆପଣ damages, costs ଓ attorneys’ fees ସହିତ ଦାୟୀ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି।

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: ଆମ Service ର activity track କରିବାକୁ ଆମେ cookies ଓ ସମାନ tracking technologies ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁ ଏବଂ କିଛି ସୂଚନା ରଖୁ। Cookies ହେଉଛି ଛୋଟ ଡାଟା file, ଯାହାରେ anonymous unique identifier ଥାଇପାରେ। Cookies website ରୁ ଆପଣଙ୍କ browser କୁ ପଠାଯାଇ ଆପଣଙ୍କ device ରେ stored ହୁଏ। Beacons, tags ଓ scripts ପରି ଅନ୍ୟ tracking technologies ମଧ୍ୟ information collect/track କରିବା ଓ Service improve/analyze କରିବା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ହୁଏ। ଆପଣ browser କୁ ସମସ୍ତ cookies refuse କରିବାକୁ କିମ୍ବା cookie ପଠାଯାଉଥିବାବେଳେ ସୂଚନା ଦେବାକୁ କହିପାରିବେ। କିନ୍ତୁ cookies accept ନକଲେ Service ର କିଛି ଅଂଶ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ। ଆମେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁଥିବା Cookies ର ଉଦାହରଣ: Session Cookies: Service operate କରିବାକୁ। Preference Cookies: ଆପଣଙ୍କ preferences ଓ settings ମନେ ରଖିବାକୁ। Security Cookies: security purposes ପାଇଁ। Advertising Cookies: ଆପଣଙ୍କ ରୁଚି ସହ ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ advertisement ଦେଖାଇବାକୁ।

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: ଏହି Privacy Policy ରେ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିବା purposes ପାଇଁ ଯେତେଦିନ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ, ସେତେଦିନ ମାତ୍ର ଆମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ Personal Data retain କରିବୁ। ଆଇନଗତ obligations ପାଳନ (ଯଥା applicable laws ପାଳନ ପାଇଁ data retain କରିବା ଦରକାର ହେଲେ), disputes resolve କରିବା, ଏବଂ legal agreements/policies enforce କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଯେତେଦୂର ଆବଶ୍ୟକ, ସେତେଦୂର ଆମେ Personal Data retain ଓ use କରିବୁ। Internal analysis purposes ପାଇଁ Usage Data ମଧ୍ୟ retain କରିବୁ। Usage Data ସାଧାରଣତଃ କମ୍ ସମୟ ପାଇଁ retain ହୁଏ, କିନ୍ତୁ security strengthen କରିବା କିମ୍ବା Service functionality improve କରିବା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ହେଲେ, କିମ୍ବା ଆଇନ ଆମକୁ ଅଧିକ ସମୟ retain କରିବାକୁ ବାଧ୍ୟ କଲେ, ଅଧିକ ସମୟ retain ହୋଇପାରେ।

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: ବିଶ୍ୱ ଇତିହାସକୁ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଯୁଗରେ ଏକ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନଶୀଳ ଚିତ୍ରରୁ ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ଜୁମ୍ ଆଉଟ୍ କରିବା ପରି ଭାବିପାରିବା। 19ଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ପୂର୍ବର କିଛି ଶତାବ୍ଦୀ ମାନବ ଇତିହାସରେ ଏକ ମୋଡ଼ ଆଣିଥିଲା, କାରଣ ବିଶ୍ୱ ଏକ ସୀମିତ ଓ ସରଳ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିଭଙ୍ଗୀରୁ ନୂତନ ଭୂଭାଗ ଓ ଉପନିବେଶ ବିଷୟରେ ବଢ଼ୁଥିବା ବୁଝାମଣାକୁ ଯାଇଥିଲା। French Revolution ପ୍ରଥମଥର ପାଇଁ ବଡ଼ ଜନସମୁଦାୟ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନତା, ସମତା ଓ ଭ୍ରାତୃତ୍ୱର ଆଦର୍ଶ ସ୍ଥାପନ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରତିବାଦରେ ଏକତ୍ର ହୋଇଥିବା ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତ ହେଲା। World War II ର ଘଟଣାମାନେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ବିଶ୍ୱକୁ ଗଢ଼ିଥିଲେ ଏବଂ 21ଶ ଶତାବ୍ଦୀର ଭିତି ରଚିଥିଲେ।
